name: Fortune Bay Corp.
description: Fortune Bay Corp. is a Canadian gold exploration and development company advancing the Goldfields Gold Project in northern Saskatchewan, which includes the Box and Athona deposits. The company also holds seven 100%-owned uranium exploration projects along the northwestern margin of Saskatchewan's Athabasca Basin, and a gold exploration property (Poma Rosa) in Chiapas, Mexico. Fortune Bay is at the explorer-to-developer stage, having completed a preliminary economic assessment on Goldfields and actively drilling to expand resources.
